name: context-mode-plusplus
absorption_note: Phenotype+ fork of mksglu/context-mode. Adds substrate::context-budget adapter (per-conv token budget via EnginePort middleware) + OTLP/HTTP trace export + cliproxy-adapter integration. Target: OmniRoute/adapters/context-mode/ (OmniRoute owns route/middleware). Alternative: PhenoMCPServers if MCP-flavoured.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; fork; integration code (middleware + adapters) belongs with route layer.
